message:
fix(docs): correct intra-doc link paths for TestClient and ShutdownController

Rustdoc intra-doc links were using bare names like `[TestClient]` and
`[ShutdownController::track_request]` which don't resolve correctly from
the modules where they appear. Updated to fully qualified crate paths:
- `[crate::TestClient]` in app.rs
- `[BackgroundTasksInner::execute_with_panic_isolation()]` in extract.rs
- `[crate::ShutdownController::track_request]` etc. in testing.rs

This fixes rustdoc warnings and ensures generated documentation links
navigate to the correct items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
